claim_text: Salesforce reported Q1 FY2027 revenue of $11.133 billion, up 13% year over year and 12% in constant currency, including $444 million Informatica contribution.
notes: Company earnings release furnished with SEC 8-K.

claim_text: Salesforce reported current remaining performance obligation of $33.6 billion, up 14% year over year and 13% in constant currency.
notes: Useful for near-term revenue visibility, but impacted by seasonality, contract terms, FX and acquisitions.

claim_text: Salesforce disclosed Agentforce and Data 360 ARR of nearly $3.4 billion, including $1.2 billion Agentforce ARR up 205% year over year and $1.1 billion Informatica Cloud ARR.
notes: Key paid-deployment/product monetization evidence; includes acquired Informatica contribution.

claim_text: Salesforce disclosed 3.8 billion Agentic Work Units delivered to date across Agentforce and Slack, growing 111% quarter over quarter.
notes: Usage evidence; needs monetization and retention linkage.

claim_text: Salesforce disclosed more than 28.6 trillion tokens processed to date, up 152% quarter over quarter.
notes: Usage scale evidence; token volume alone is not business value.

claim_text: Bookings from Agentforce One Edition and Agentforce for Apps grew nearly 60% year over year.
notes: Bookings growth supports expansion, but absolute dollars and retention are not disclosed in this line.

claim_text: Salesforce disclosed that more than 50% of Agentforce and Data 360 bookings came from existing customers in Q1 FY2027.
notes: Supports cross-sell into installed base; still needs net expansion/retention evidence.

claim_text: Data 360 ingested 52 trillion records in Q1 FY2027, up 136% year over year, including 35 trillion via Zero Copy, up 277% year over year.
notes: Usage evidence for data layer; needs revenue and customer retention linkage.

claim_text: Salesforce disclosed Slack MCP surpassed 1 million active users within six weeks of launch.
notes: Adoption evidence but not directly monetization evidence.

claim_text: Salesforce raised FY2027 revenue guidance midpoint to $46.05 billion, implying about 11% year-over-year growth and about 3 points of Informatica contribution.
notes: Company guidance; highlights gap between product metrics and total company growth acceleration.

claim_text: Salesforce guided FY2027 non-GAAP diluted EPS to $14.06-$14.12 and GAAP diluted EPS to $7.93-$7.99.
notes: Valuation anchor.

claim_text: Salesforce entered into a $25 billion accelerated share repurchase with upfront delivery of 103 million shares and final settlement expected in Q3 FY2027.
notes: Capital allocation and share-count distortion are important for EPS and valuation.

claim_text: Salesforce reported noncurrent debt of $39.280 billion and cash and cash equivalents of $8.935 billion at April 30, 2026.
notes: Debt increased after the ASR financing; affects EV and capital allocation interpretation.

claim_text: Stooq showed CRM closing at $191.10 on 2026-05-29.
notes: Market quote source; refresh before live use.

claim_text: SEC companyfacts showed 819 million CRM shares outstanding at May 21, 2026.
notes: Share count reflects large ASR impact and should be reconciled with diluted shares used in guidance.

claim_text: Using $191.10 per share and 819 million shares, CRM's approximate equity market capitalization was $156.5 billion.
notes: Formula: 191.10 * 819m. Share count affected by ASR; use with caution.

claim_text: Using $191.10 per share and FY2027 non-GAAP EPS guidance midpoint of $14.09, CRM traded at approximately 13.6x FY2027 non-GAAP EPS guidance.
Using $191.10 per share and FY2027 GAAP EPS guidance midpoint of $7.96, CRM traded at approximately 24.0x FY2027 GAAP EPS guidance.
StockAnalysis/Finnhub showed CRM FY2027 revenue estimate of $46.59B and EPS estimate of $13.32, and FY2028 revenue estimate of $51.01B and EPS estimate of $14.98.
notes: Forecast data sourced by StockAnalysis from Finnhub / Wall Street analysts; EPS definition may be non-GAAP.

claim_text: StockAnalysis showed CRM market cap of $156.51B, enterprise value of $187.22B, forward P/E of 13.74x, P/FCF of 10.68x, EV/Sales of 4.37x and EV/FCF of 12.77x.
notes: Third-party market data; reconcile before live investment use.

claim_text: Salesforce FY2026 10-K reported FY2026 operating cash flow of $14.996B and capital expenditures of $594M, implying free cash flow of $14.402B.
notes: Used with FY2027 FCF growth guide to model FY2027 FCF; not external consensus.

claim_text: Using FY2026 FCF of $14.402B and Salesforce FY2027 FCF growth guidance midpoint of 4.5%, modeled FY2027 FCF is approximately $15.05B.
notes: Formula: 14.402B * 1.045. This is not consensus FCF.

claim_text: StockAnalysis showed selected peer multiples: NOW forward P/E 28.68x, EV/Sales 8.80x and EV/FCF 26.50x; ADBE forward P/E 10.76x, EV/Sales 4.28x and EV/FCF 10.13x; ORCL forward P/E 29.99x and EV/Sales 12.05x.
notes: Peer set is illustrative: NOW workflow software, ADBE mature creative/software, ORCL cloud/database infrastructure/software.

claim_text: CompaniesMarketCap showed CRM year-end P/S ratios of 11.7x in 2021, 5.37x in 2022, 5.63x in 2023, 7.58x in 2024 and 6.15x in 2025.
notes: Used as rough historical P/S range; avoid relying on its current 2026 value because current-date snapshots can vary.

claim_text: A broader current peer table covering CRM, NOW, ADBE, ORCL, MSFT, SAP, INTU and PEGA showed peer forward P/E roughly 10.8x-30.0x, EV/Sales roughly 3.28x-12.05x and EV/FCF roughly 10.13x-46.52x where meaningful.
notes: Peer definitions are imperfect; ORCL EV/FCF is n/a because current FCF is negative.

claim_text: CompaniesMarketCap showed CRM trailing P/E history including 22.7x in 2021, 141x in 2022, 14.7x in 2023 and 7.03x in 2024, illustrating why trailing P/E is too noisy to use as a clean forward valuation range.
notes: Historical P/E is useful context but not a substitute for historical forward P/E or EV/FCF series.

claim_text: StockAnalysis ratios history showed CRM forward P/E of 13.74 current, then 16.77x, 31.67x, 30.40x, 29.97x and 55.99x for FY2026-FY2022; EV/FCF of 12.77 current, then 14.18x, 26.18x, 28.51x, 26.26x and 44.07x for FY2026-FY2022; and EV/Sales of 4.37 current, then 4.92x, 8.59x, 7.77x, 5.29x and 8.79x for FY2026-FY2022.
notes: Closes the historical EV/FCF and forward P/E source gap for public-workflow purposes; definitions still require caution and FY2 FCF consensus remains unavailable.

claim_text: MarketScreener's Salesforce financial forecasts page showed Cash Flow Forecast free cash flow of $14.910B for fiscal January 2027, $16.458B for fiscal January 2028 and $18.134B for fiscal January 2029.
notes: Public analyst-estimate proxy for FY2 FCF; use as forecast/estimate, not Mira-modeled value. Source definitions should be challenged by external reviewer.
